title: KitRenamer
description: Use an interactive gui to quickly rename your objects via GUI
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/thDKUy7.png)

[Showcase on BbB web](https://builtbybit.com/resources/kitrenamer-rename-all-your-kits.39081/)

Transcription:

**KitRenamer**

KitRenamer is a powerful tool that provides administrators a unique, easy and customizable way to rename their kits

**Features:**
- **Actions through GUI**: Manage all changes what you want to do through an interactive GUI
- **Do you prefer config?**: is okay, we have files support, just run /ks to reload
- **Custom Replacements**: Manage all repleacements easily on the GUI
- Hex color Support
- Open Source
- Just one command (/ks)
- Easy config
- Asynchronous Events
